changes: Promoted all HILLS/COLVAR/Kernels from [external] to [present] — full-data pseudoSpore
Added Module 01 COLVAR (500K frames) for zero-trust FES re-derivation
Added receipts/environment.toml with [hardware]+[software] for litho ingest compatibility
Module 08 status changed from PROPOSED to SKIP (roadmap, not computational)
Added [external_braids] section to data.toml: PDB, PLUMED-NEST, CHARMM36 URIs
Unified data.toml to single [hashes] section — no present/external split
Added nest-validate guidestone deploy subcommand for fully automated pipeline
Fixed PDB 2D24 resolution: 1.41 -> 1.85 Å (sourced from PDB REMARK 2)
Corrected catalytic itinerary notation to match paper exactly
Added full bibliography and external_references to provenance braids
PIPELINE INTEGRITY: Eliminated ad-hoc metadata — all values now pipeline-derived or cross-checked
PIPELINE INTEGRITY: validation.json sourced from real validation_results.json (not fabricated checks)
PIPELINE INTEGRITY: 19 scope.toml fields verified against GRO/MDP/COLVAR/topology/PLUMED sources
PIPELINE INTEGRITY: environment auto-detected at emit time, not copied from hand-authored file
PIPELINE INTEGRITY: tolerance authority model formalized (root=default, module=override with justification)

guidestone_integrity_milestone.summary: Transition from ad-hoc metadata transcoding to fully pipeline-derived GuideStone
guidestone_integrity_milestone.before: scope.toml values were hand-authored and blindly copied to validation.json, liveSpore.json, and receipts/
guidestone_integrity_milestone.after: Every metadata value is either (a) extracted from authoritative data files and cross-checked, (b) explicitly marked as external-sourced with provenance, or (c) detected from the runtime environment

verified_sources.validation: guidestone validate real checks (BLAKE3, FES parity, OPES transitions)

pending_downstream: biomeos CLI nucleus ingest subcommand wired to clap parser
NestGate content-addressed store running on gate
